    • Logging with logger: namespaces and thresholds

Outputs module server

mod_outputs_server.Rd

Reacts to the fetch signal from mod_inputs_server(), downloads adjusted price data via get_stock_prices(), computes daily log returns with get_stock_returns(), and summarises performance metrics with summarise_performance(). Renders all five tooltip-demo outputs (KPI boxes, bslib, shinyhelper, prompter, shinyalert, reactable) and returns the reactive performance-summary tibble for use by mod_download_server().

Usage

mod_outputs_server(id, inputs_r)

Arguments

id

Module namespace id.

inputs_r

Reactive list returned by mod_inputs_server().

Value

A reactive tibble with columns symbol, ann_return, ann_vol, and sharpe — the output of summarise_performance().

Details

Calls shinyhelper::observe_helpers() internally — do not call it separately in app_server().

See also

mod_outputs_ui()

On this page
